title: AGUA VISTA PARK - Updated June 2026 - 29 Photos - Yelp
content: I agree with reviewers that it's nice to access the water in a non-touristy area and with free parking, but it does feel sketchy even in the daytime.

title: Agua Vista Park, Mission Bay neighborhood, San Francisco
content: Love it and walk it every day. Seeing more and more birds and the plants are filling in nicely. There is a bit of graffiti on the wood posts

title: Agua Vista Park, 801 Terry Francois St, San Francisco, CA 94140, US

title: BUENA VISTA PARK - 367 Photos & 191 Reviews - Parks - Yelp
content: A great place to walk around for 30-60 min. Overall, a great little oasis in SF that is quiet and makes you forget that you're in the city.

title: Agua Vista Park | SF Port
content: It is next to the San Francisco Bay Trail and has unobstructed views of the shipyard. The park includes green areas and paths between Terry Francois Boulevard
